name: standalone-agent
description: Autonomous agentic coding assistant — air-gapped, zero external dependencies

standaloneAgent.activeEndpoint.description: Name of the active endpoint. Must match a name in standaloneAgent.endpoints.

standaloneAgent.servers.markdownDescription: Physical server instances. Each server has a `name` (used by endpoints), `url`, and optional `apiKey`.

name.description: Unique display name for this server

apiKey.description: API key / bearer token (leave empty if not required)

standaloneAgent.endpoints.markdownDescription:
Logical endpoints — each combines a server with an adapter type and optional overrides.

**Adapters:** `openai`, `gemini-jank`, `gemini`, `ask-sage`

For Ask Sage's OpenAI sub-API: use `adapter: "openai"` with `pathOverrides`.

Per-endpoint `streaming` overrides the global toggle. `model` overrides the sidebar model selector.

name.description: Unique display name shown in the endpoint dropdown

server.description: Must match a name in standaloneAgent.servers

adapter.description: Protocol adapter to use for this endpoint

streaming.description: Per-endpoint streaming override. Omit to use the global streaming setting.

model.description: Per-endpoint model override. Omit to use the sidebar model selector.

pathOverrides.description: Override URL paths for non-standard deployments (e.g. Ask Sage sub-APIs).

sessionField.description: [gemini-jank] Response/request field for the session ID. Default: session_id

modelField.description: [gemini-jank] Request field for the model name. Default: model

minWordCount.description: [gemini-jank] Minimum word count for collapsed messages. Default: 0 (disabled)

systemTag.description: [gemini-jank] XML tag for the system prompt block. Default: SystemPrompt

historyTag.description: [gemini-jank] XML tag for conversation history. Default: ConversationHistory

currentTag.description: [gemini-jank] XML tag for the current request. Default: CurrentRequest

apiVersion.description: [gemini] API version path segment. Default: v1 (stable). Use v1beta for preview features.

useQueryKey.description: [gemini] Pass the API key as ?key= query param instead of the x-goog-api-key header. Default: false

cachedContent.description: [gemini] Pre-created cachedContents resource name to attach to every request (e.g. cachedContents/abc123). Reduces token costs for large fixed context.

standaloneAgent.model.description: Model identifier. Set via the sidebar model dropdown (persisted here) or type directly.

standaloneAgent.streaming.description: Stream tokens as they arrive via SSE. Disable for APIs that don't support streaming.

standaloneAgent.toolPermissions.markdownDescription: Permission per tool: `"allow"` (run silently), `"ask"` (prompt each time), `"deny"` (always block).

standaloneAgent.systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt override. When non-empty, replaces the built-in prompt for the selected mode.

standaloneAgent.enterToSend.description: When true: Enter sends the message, Shift+Enter inserts a newline. When false: Shift+Enter sends, Enter inserts a newline.

standaloneAgent.maxIterations.description: Maximum agent loop iterations before auto-stopping.

standaloneAgent.verboseLogging.description: Write full request/response payloads to the Standalone Agent output channel.
